ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "sqft_living15" INTEGER /* Living space square footage of the property (in the last 15 years) */,
  "sqft_lot15" INTEGER /* Lot size square footage of the property (in the last 15 years) */,
  "bedrooms_squared" REAL /* Square of the number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bed_bath_rooms" REAL /* Combined number of bathrooms and bedrooms in the property */,
  "log_sqft_living" REAL /* Logarithm of the square footage of living space */,
  "lat_plus_long" REAL /* Sum of latitude and longitude coordinates */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major renovation */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the property */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a basement */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning information for the property */,
  "hoa_fees" REAL /* Monthly Homeowner Association (HOA) fees */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Annual property tax */,
  "hoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the HOA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the real estate agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number */,
  "office" TEXT /* Name of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the agent (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., new, resale) */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "sale_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the sale (e.g., as-is, with upgrades) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., price change, renovation) */,
  "change_value" REAL /* Value of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "change_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property with the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., pool, gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_size" TEXT /* Size of the amenity (e.g., 10x20 ft) */,
  "amenity_status" TEXT /* Status of the amenity (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., mortgage, payment) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property linked to the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the property location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "distance_to_city_center" REAL /* Distance to the city center in miles */,
  "proximity_to_schools" INTEGER /* Indicates proximity to schools */,
  "proximity_to_parks" INTEGER /* Indicates proximity to parks */,
  "proximity_to_shopping" INTEGER /* Indicates proximity to shopping areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view property) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties on that date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous observation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., real estate board, government statistics) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend data (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the photo is associated with */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "photo_type" TEXT /* Type of photo (e.g., interior, exterior) */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "uploader" TEXT /* Name of the person who uploaded the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
